mapper.select:
SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.UUID , A.UUID_SQ , A.FILE_NM , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_EXTENSION , A.REAL_FILE_NM , A.BIZ_TYPE , (A.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') AS REG_DATE , A.REG_USER_ID , getUserName(A.GATE_CD, A.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , A.DEL_FLAG , A.APP_DOC_NUM , A.APP_DOC_CNT FROM STOCATCH A WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND A.REG_DATE <= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -60)
AND A.REG_DATE <= DATEADD(month, -60, GETDATE())
AND (A.APP_DOC_NUM IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCATCN N WHERE N.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND N.APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND N.APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT AND N.SIGN_STATUS IN ('R', 'C') AND N.DEL_FLAG = '0' ))
AND getUserName(A.GATE_CD, A.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) LIKE '%' + #{REG_USER_NM} + '%'
AND A.REAL_FILE_NM LIKE '%' + #{REAL_FILE_NM} + '%'
AND A.BIZ_TYPE = #{BIZ_TYPE}
ORDER BY A.REG_DATE DESC

SELECT A.GATE_CD , A.UUID , A.UUID_SQ , A.FILE_NM , A.FILE_PATH , A.FILE_SIZE , A.FILE_EXTENSION , A.REAL_FILE_NM , A.BIZ_TYPE , N.APP_DOC_NUM , N.APP_DOC_CNT FROM STOCATCH A JOIN STOCATCN N ON A.GATE_CD = N.GATE_CD AND A.APP_DOC_NUM = N.APP_DOC_NUM AND A.APP_DOC_CNT = N.APP_DOC_CNT WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{GATE_CD} AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND N.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' -- 결재 승인 상태 AND N.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT N.GATE_CD , N.APP_DOC_NUM , N.APP_DOC_CNT , N.SIGN_STATUS , getComCode(N.GATE_CD, 'M038', 'AP', 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS SIGN_STATUS_NM -- 결재상태 공통코드 매핑 필요 시 사용 , (N.REG_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi') AS REG_DATE , N.REG_USER_ID , getUserName(N.GATE_CD, N.REG_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REG_USER_NM , (N.SIGN_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi') AS SIGN_DATE , COUNT(A.UUID) AS FILE_CNT , SUM(A.FILE_SIZE) AS TOTAL_SIZE FROM STOCATCN N LEFT JOIN STOCATCH A ON N.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND N.APP_DOC_NUM = A.APP_DOC_NUM AND N.APP_DOC_CNT = A.APP_DOC_CNT WHERE N.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND N.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND N.REG_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM})
AND N.REG_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND N.SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS}
GROUP BY N.GATE_CD , N.APP_DOC_NUM , N.APP_DOC_CNT , N.SIGN_STATUS , N.REG_DATE , N.REG_USER_ID , N.SIGN_DATE ORDER BY N.REG_DATE DESC
